proposed_relations.description: M15 SBS features comparison (2010 vs 2012) from March 2010 CB3 presentation

evidence_refs.source_quote: Features Current M15 M15 SBS (2010) M15 SBS (2012) Local service Yes Yes Yes Limited service Yes No No Simpler service pattern No Yes Off-board fare collection No Yes Regular bus fare Yes Yes Improved bus lanes No Yes Bus bulbs No No Yes Transit Signal Priority No No Yes (below Houston St)

decisions.rationale: The claim text describes M15 SBS features for 2010 and 2012, and the evidence block p004_c0003 explicitly names 'M15 SBS' in its feature comparison table. The canonical route record 'route_m15-sbs' represents the M15 Select Bus Service route.
